audit_items.proof_trace: Both layers enforce gas caps but serve different purposes: txpool rejects transactions exceeding block gas limit (optimization to avoid unexecutable transactions), while block validation enforces EIP-7825 per-transaction cap (16.7M when enabled, unlimited when disabled per protocol). This design is correct: Ethereum protocol does not require individual transaction gas limits to be bounded by block gas limit, only that total gas used during execution respects the block limit.
